featured.name: EverMind EverMemOS
featured.tagline: Persistent memory infrastructure for AI agents. Plus an $80k dev competition.
featured.why_radar: Memory is the unsolved problem in agent stacks. EverMind tackles it with a dedicated memory OS for agents. They are backing it with an $80k developer competition running until April 4th, looking for plugins (VSCode, Chrome, Slack) and core optimisations. Serious money behind a real gap.

featured.name: AgentWeb
featured.tagline: Free business directory API for AI agents. 11M+ businesses across 195 countries.
featured.why_radar: Clean data layer for AI agents that need real-world business info. Phone numbers, emails, hours, addresses. No more scraping Google or parsing random websites. Full-text and geo search included. Free tier is generous.

picks.name: Mission Control
picks.tagline: Open-source task management built for AI coding agents.
picks.why_radar: Task board designed for working with Claude Code, Cursor, and Windsurf. Gives you visibility into what agents are doing, role-specific instructions, and clear work items. If you are running multiple agents on a codebase, this helps keep track.
